features: Compact and Stylish Design: The white toaster 2 slice features a sleek, compact design that fits any kitchen. This compact toaster saves counter space and enhances your kitchen's aesthetic appeal, making it a must-have home essential.

Efficient and Customizable Toasting: This 2 slice toaster offers optimal performance with evenly spaced slots for various bread types. The adjustable browning control ensures perfect crispiness, making it an ideal electric toaster.

User-Friendly and Safe Operation: Our white toaster prioritizes safety and ease of use with a high-lift lever, automatic shut-off, and cool-touch sides, making this toaster 2 slice perfect for any household.

Easy Maintenance and Cleaning: The two slice toaster includes a removable crumb tray for effortless cleaning. Keeping your toaster white clean extends its lifespan and ensures hygienic use, a key feature of kitchen appliances.

Affordable Quality: This cheap toaster offers reliable performance at a budget-friendly price. Our white toaster 2 slice combines quality and affordability, making it a top choice among toasters 2 slice.
description: Product Description About PIFCO PIFCO is a household name, trusted by millions to provide cleaning, heating, and lighting solutions. PIFCO products have a place in the heart and history of UK domestic appliances. PIFCO White 2 Slice Toaster Elevate your toasting experience with this sleek, white 2-slice toaster. Featuring 6 browning settings and an Anti-Jam Function, you'll achieve perfect toast every time. Its space-saving design fits any countertop, while the removable crumb tray and non-stick coating make cleanup a breeze. Made with food-grade safe materials and low wattage for energy efficiency, this toaster combines style, functionality, and safety in your kitchen. Enhanced Functionality - Variable Browning Control Easy Cleaning - Removable Crumb Tray Safe - Made from food-grade safe materials Slot size: Width: 2.5cm Length: 13cm 6 Browning functions Featuring 6 browning options, this toaster ensures your toast is browned to your preference, while a cancel setting allows you to stop the toasting cycle midway. A reheat function perfectly warmed toast, and the anti-jam feature ensures easy removal of each slice. 2 Slice Slots Add a touch of brilliance to your kitchen with the PIFCO 2 slice toaster. Boasting a stunning, radiant white hue, this compact toaster complements any kitchen decor. With its elegant and refined design, this toaster is sure to impress. Removable Crumb Tray The discreet slide-out crumb tray at the base efficiently collects excess crumbs for easy cleaning. Simply remove, empty, and replace the tray to maintain a tidy toaster. The non-slip rubberized base ensures stability and added safety during use.
